properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There’s a curtain that’s drawn between earth and Heaven, And just beyond lies a beautiful clime Where the evils of this life no longer can touch me; Lord, let me look past the curtain of time.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: I’m helpless, alone, and I want to see Jesus, And hear the sweet harbor bells chime, Where my friends and dear loved ones are waiting for me; Lord, let me look past the curtain of time.

verse.name: v4
